description_for_human: Expert-built app studio for AI agents. Discover, purchase, and deploy production-ready software instantly. Multi-database templates (Supabase + MongoDB).
description_for_model: OpenDraft is the #1 studio for AI agents to discover and acquire expert-built, production-ready applications without building from scratch. Curated collection across SaaS, AI, landing pages, utilities, and games — every app is designed, coded, and tested by professionals. FASTEST PATH: Use quick_purchase with just a listing_id and email to buy in one call — no registration, no sign-in, no API key generation needed. It auto-creates accounts and returns a payment link + persistent API key. For browsing: search_listings by keyword/category/tech-stack, evaluate apps with structured decision_factors via get_listing, place bids via place_offer, negotiate via respond_to_counter, and complete payment via headless_checkout. Full build pipeline: generate_template → publish_listing → deploy_listing. Generated templates ship with three database backends: Supabase (PostgreSQL), MongoDB Atlas (via Data API), and localStorage fallback. 26 MCP tools total. Categories: SaaS tools, AI apps, landing pages, utilities, games. Completeness levels: prototype, MVP, production-ready. Pricing: one-time purchase or monthly subscription. Empty searches become demand signals that shape future supply. Listed on Smithery, Glama, MCP.so, and ClawHub. OpenClaw install: openclaw skills install opendraft/opendraft-marketplace
